profile.bio: Golden Egg Addict & PvP Learner. Besides Splatoon I also like dogs, arts, and programming. I host Bailan Cup (overfishing tournament) every year.

achievements.title: Eggsecutive VP 999
achievements.note: First Chinese player to peak on JP servers.

achievements.title: Shift Streak: 200
achievements.note: 200 clears in a row, no defeats.

artPrizes.label: 2nd place: 悲伤哈密瓜不 · art by @cobii_illu
3rd place: Stellar Tide · art by @正经菜市场
Most Fish Stick: profile-pic set · art by @LittleGold
Bailan Lucky: 打到山千红蛋就算了 · art by @Bailan

format: Two independent sessions, merged into one combined ranking; both follow the same rules and format, so scores compare directly.
Team division only. Each player can register for one session and one team only.
Maximum 10 shifts per team. Final scores read straight from the Nintendo Switch App, no disputes.
cup.scoring: Total Golden Eggs across all 10 shifts, plus Scale Points from your first King Salmonid: Bronze +4, Silver +5, Gold +6.
cup.eligibility: Prize-eligible teams must complete all 10 shifts at a minimum average hazard level of 168% (≈ EVP 40).

rankings.team: 多的不说，少的不唠。八个大招一大筐金蛋就开造，搂他！
關於我們在熊先生商會中進行打工遇見了無限塔桶隊魷成泳圈滅團的故事
